texto: In the parable of the ten virgins, Jesus is clearly saying that prior to his return the whole church will be asleep (Mt. 25:5), not just the foolish virgins but the wise as well. This verse turned my thinking upside down. No matter how I looked at it, no matter what commentary I read, no one had an adequate answer for what this verse really says. Denomination Presidents, Seminary Professors, Pastors and everyone in the pews: Jesus is telling us that we’re all snoozing.
explicacao: Citação de Nelson Walters sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In the parable of the ten virgins, Jesus is clearly saying that prior to his return the whole chu…” articula reflexao, christianity, jesus em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como jesus e rapture.
